positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a celestial forest at twilight. The scene features glowing bioluminescent mushrooms and stylized, meandering tree roots that form patterns. Central composition with a prominent, detailed moon phase visible through the branches. Use a clean, gothic line art style combined with vibrant watercolor washes of deep indigo, sapphire blue, lavender, and soft gold. The forest elements should create strong silhouettes against a gradient sky. Intricate, repeating pattern suitable for seamless repetition. Perfect for apparel print, high contrast, highly detailed, vector art aesthetic.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, logo, watermark, signature, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, jpeg artifacts, messy, photorealistic
